customer_messages.body: We are aware of active concerns with your account and have engaged our cross-functional recovery team. Your dedicated team is reviewing the situation and will follow up with a resolution plan within one business day. We appreciate your partnership and are committed to resolving these matters promptly.

audit_events.description: Cross-functional escalation workflow started for account recovery.
